name: Blackwing - Zonda the Dusk
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＢＦ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ブラックフェザー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>刻</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>夜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>や</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>のゾンダ
name_jp_tl: Black Feather - Zonda the Timely Night
desc: You cannot Special Summon monsters from the Extra Deck, except Synchro Monsters. You can only use 1 of the following effects of "Blackwing - Zonda the Dusk" per turn, and only once that turn. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can target 1 monster on the field; return it to the hand. You can banish this card from your GY; Special Summon 1 Level 5 or higher "Blackwing" monster from your hand or Deck, then take damage equal to its ATK.
mnst_eff: You cannot Special Summon monsters from the Extra Deck, except Synchro Monsters. You can only use 1 of the following effects of "Blackwing - Zonda the Dusk" per turn, and only once that turn. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can target 1 monster on the field; return it to the hand. You can banish this card from your GY; Special Summon 1 Level 5 or higher "Blackwing" monster from your hand or Deck, then take damage equal to its ATK.
eff: You cannot Special Summon monsters from the Extra Deck, except Synchro Monsters. You can only use 1 of the following effects of "Blackwing - Zonda the Dusk" per turn, and only once that turn. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can target 1 monster on the field; return it to the hand. You can banish this card from your GY; Special Summon 1 Level 5 or higher "Blackwing" monster from your hand or Deck, then take damage equal to its ATK.

sets.set: 25th Anniversary Tin: Dueling Heroes Mega Pack

summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons from the Extra Deck
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
